title: GBN-AG notification status
description: Workflow states for a GBN-AG pre-notification, used as the value space for notificationStatusCode on ExchangedDocument. This file is the working source of truth in the absence of a live Defra codelists service; when that service goes live at https://codelists.tbc.defra.gov.uk/, this file is retired and the URL stays the same.

values.label: Draft
values.description: Notification has been created but not yet submitted. Editable by the importer.

values.label: Submitted
values.description: Notification has been formally submitted. First submission is revision V1; subsequent re-submissions increment versionId.

values.label: Amend
values.description: Notification has been re-opened for editing after a prior submission. Returns to SUBMITTED on re-submission.

values.label: Withdrawn
values.description: Notification has been withdrawn. Terminal state.
